steps.title: Keep the title with the name
steps.content: The phrase before the blank identifies Valerie Trouet by profession: dendrochronologist Valerie Trouet. A professional title or identifying noun directly before a name is not separated from that name by a comma, dash, or colon.

steps.title: Remove separators
steps.content: Choice A adds a dash, incorrectly turning the name into an interruption or elaboration. Choice B inserts a comma between the identifying noun and the name. Choice D uses a colon, which would introduce a list or explanation, not a name. The answer is C.
